subcodes.first_line: O Shaykh Ahmad—upon him be the glory of God—news hath reached of thy arrival at the altar of sacrifice and love in the region of Zanjan, and of the attainment of spiritual joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب شیخ احمد علیه بهاء الله خبر وصول شما بقربان گاه عشق خطه زنجان و حصول روح
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
